%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%2C%20getDtsg()%20%7B%20return%20window%3F.DTSGInitialData%3F.token%20%3F%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%2C%20getSiteData()%20%7B%20return%20window%3F.SiteData%20%3F%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Fapi.js%20var%20buildUrl%20%3D%20(path%2C%20params%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20cleanPath%20%3D%20String(path%20%7C%7C%20%22%22).replace(%2F%5E%5C%2F%2B%2F%2C%20%22%22)%3B%20const%20url%20%3D%20new%20URL(cleanPath%2C%20GRAPH_API_BASE)%3B%20Object.entries(params).forEach((%5Bkey%2C%20value%5D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(value%20!%3D%3D%20void%200%20%26%26%20value%20!%3D%3D%20null%20%26%26%20value%20!%3D%3D%20%22%22)%20%7B%20url.searchParams.set(key%2C%20String(value))%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20return%20url%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20normalizeError%20%3D%20(error)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20message%3A%20error%3F.message%20%7C%7C%20%22%5Cu041D%5Cu0435%5Cu0438%5Cu0437%5Cu0432%5Cu0435%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu044F%20%5Cu043E%5Cu0448%5Cu0438%5Cu0431%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%20API%22%2C%20code%3A%20error%3F.code%20%7C%7C%20%22API_ERROR%22%2C%20raw%3A%20error%20%7D)%3B%20var%20withRetry%20%3D%20async%20(fn%2C%20options%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20retries%20%3D%20options.retries%20%3F%3F%202%3B%20const%20delayMs%20%3D%20options.delayMs%20%3F%3F%20400%3B%20let%20lastError%3B%20for%20(let%20attempt%20%3D%200%3B%20attempt%20%3C%3D%20retries%3B%20attempt%20%2B%3D%201)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20return%20await%20fn(attempt)%3B%20%7D%20catch%20(error)%20%7B%20lastError%20%3D%20error%3B%20if%20(attempt%20%3D%3D%3D%20retries)%20%7B%20break%3B%20%7D%20await%20new%20Promise((resolve)%20%3D%3E%20setTimeout(resolve%2C%20delayMs%20*%20(attempt%20%2B%201)))%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20throw%20lastError%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20request%20%3D%20async%20(method%2C%20path%2C%20%7B%20params%20%3D%20%7B%7D%2C%20body%2C%20accessToken%2C%20retries%20%7D%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!accessToken)%20%7B%20throw%20%7B%20message%3A%20%22Access%20token%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu04 20options%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20request(%22DELETE%22%2C%20path%2C%20%7B%20...options%2C%20params%20%7D)%2C%20getAllPages%2C%20withRetry%2C%20normalizeError%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Flogger.js%20var%20timestamp%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20(%2F*%20%40__PURE__%20*%2F%20new%20Date()).toLocaleTimeString(%22ru-RU%22%2C%20%7B%20hour12%3A%20false%20%7D)%3B%20var%20emit%20%3D%20(level%2C%20message%2C%20meta%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20level%2C%20message%2C%20meta%2C%20ts%3A%20timestamp()%20%7D)%3B%20var%20logger%20%3D%20%7B%20info%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22info%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20success%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22success%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20warning%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22warning%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20error%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22error%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Futils.js%20var%20safeRemoveNode%20%3D%20(node)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(node%20%26%26%20node.parentNode)%20%7B%20node.parentNode.removeChild(node)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fui%2Fstyles.js%20var%20baseStyles%20%3D%20%60%20%23fbinspector-root%20%7B%20all%3A%20initial%3B%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%20top%3A%2020px%3B%20right%3A%2020px%3B%20z-index%3A%202147483647%3B%20font-family%3A%20Inter%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif%3B%20color%3A%20%23e8fff0%3B%20%7D%20%60%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fui%2Fshell.js%20var%20createShell%20%3D%20(%7B%20root%20%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20container%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22div%22)%3B%20container.innerHTML%20%3D%20%60%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22background%3A%230f1715%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%232b433a%3Bborder-radius%3A14px%3Bpadding%3A14px%3Bmin-width%3A320px%3Bmax-width%3A420px%3B%22%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Bjustify-content%3Aspace-between%3Balign-items%3Aflex-start%3Bgap%3A8px%3B%22%3E%20%3Cdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22font-size%3A20px%3Bfo 5Cu0434%5Cu043E%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0443%5Cu043F%5Cu0430%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu0439%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu043D.%20%5Cu041F%5Cu0440%5Cu043E%5Cu0432%5Cu0435%5Cu0440%5Cu044C%5Cu0442%5Cu0435%20%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu043F%5Cu0443%5Cu0441%5Cu043A%20%5Cu0432%20Ads%20Manager.%22))%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%22AuthService%3A%20%5Cu0442%5Cu043E%5Cu043A%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%20%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu0443%5Cu0447%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%2C%20%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu043F%5Cu0443%5Cu0441%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%5Cu044E%20API%20smoke%20test%20%2Fme%3Ffields%3Did%2Cname%22))%3B%20try%20%7B%20const%20data%20%3D%20await%20fbApi.get(%22me%22%2C%20%7B%20fields%3A%20%22id%2Cname%22%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20accessToken%3A%20token%2C%20retries%3A%201%20%7D)%3B%20shell.appendLog(logger.success(%60Smoke%20test%20OK%3A%20%24%7Bdata.name%20%7C%7C%20%22unknown%22%7D%20(%24%7Bdata.id%20%7C%7C%20%22no-id%22%7D)%60))%3B%20%7D%20catch%20(error)%20%7B%20const%20normalized%20%3D%20fbApi.normalizeError(error)%3B%20shell.appendLog(logger.error(%60Smoke%20test%20FAIL%3A%20%24%7Bnormalized.message%7D%60))%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20var%20createInstance%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20style%20%3D%20mountStyles()%3B%20const%20root%20%3D%20mountRoot()%3B%20const%20shell%20%3D%20createShell(%7B%20root%20%7D)%3B%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%22Shell%20%5Cu0441%5Cu043C%5Cu043E%5Cu043D%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu0440%5Cu043E%5Cu0432%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%22))%3B%20runSmokeTest(shell)%3B%20return%20%7B%20destroy()%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.warning(%22Destroy%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu0437%5Cu0432%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%2C%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu043D%5Cu044F%5Cu044E%20cleanup%22))%3B%20shell.destroy()%3B%20safeRemoveNode(root)%3B%20safeRemoveNode(style)%3B%20if%20(window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%3D%3D%20this)%20%7B%20delete%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20launch%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20existing%20%3D%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20if%20(existing%20%26%26%20typeof%20existing.destroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22function%22)%20%7B%20existing.destroy()%3B%20%7D%20const%20instance%20%3D%20createInstance()%3B%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%20instance%3B%20return%20instance%3B%20%7D%3B%20launch()%3B%20%7D)()%3B
